events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in Dartford, Kent, in 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rockin'! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of the 90s. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place over three days from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock. Which iconic performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away at the age of 42. He would have been 91 today.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in '77. His music lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, passing away on September 13. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legendary Voice
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation, who would have been 55 this year. His impact is undeniable.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His guitar work still sounds out of this world.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is 57 this year! That album cover is still one of the most recognisable of all time.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in Akron, Ohio, in 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Forever a rock icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on this day in Manchester in 1972, celebrating his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace.

events.title: iPod's 25th Anniversary
events.blurb: Apple first unveiled the revolutionary iPod on October 23, 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple introduced the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music on the go.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to 64 years of 007.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86
events.blurb: Co-founder of The Beatles and iconic solo artist John Lennon was born on this day in Liverpool in 1940. He would have been 86 today.

angles.name: A True Visionary
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, famous for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy.
